steps.note: Step 1: Click the casepilot project name on its project card
Step 2: Click the case name link "cases-list" in the table

steps.selector: #root > div > main > div > div > section:nth-of-type(3) > table > tbody > tr:nth-of-type(1)
steps.note: Step 4: Click the first finished row in the run history table
Step 5: FAIL banner is visible on the run detail page
Step 6: Click the Download artifacts button in the banner
Expectation 2: The run detail page stays open after the download starts
Expectation 2 (alt): Download artifacts link still visible — page did not navigate away
